<!--
Use this template to describe your changes. Fill in the **Test Plan** section
so a reviewer knows how to verify the change. If the change requires no
testing, add the tag `#trivial` to the PR description.
-->

## Summary

A short description of what this PR changes and why.

## Motivation and Context

Why is this change needed? Link related issues or PRs if applicable.

## Test Plan

Describe the steps a reviewer should take to verify the change. Be explicit
— include commands, sample inputs, expected outputs, or UI steps.

If this PR requires no testing, add `#trivial` to the PR description so
reviewers know no further verification is needed.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Related Issues

Link any relevant issues or PRs.
